final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing editorial photo of a modern steel smelting plant interior during a production moment.

Style/medium: industrial documentary photography, photorealistic, in the spirit of Lewis Hine meets Sebastião Salgado heavy industry series
Composition: wide-angle low-angle shot looking upward at the electric arc furnace, slow shutter speed to capture motion blur of flowing molten steel, strong scale contrast between human workers and giant machinery
Subject: massive electric arc furnace during steel tapping, molten steel pouring like an orange-red waterfall with countless sparks flying, workers in heat-resistant suits and face shields operating equipment in the distance
Scene/backdrop: vast industrial steel plant interior, steel framework structure at ceiling visible through smoke and light, floor covered with metallic dust, dim ambient environment
Lighting/mood: the pouring molten steel serves as the primary dramatic light source, casting intense orange-red glow against deep shadows, atmospheric smoke diffusing the light
Color palette: deep gray and iron black as base, intense orange-red from molten steel as dominant warm accent, metallic silver highlights
Materials/textures: rough steel surfaces, flowing liquid metal with reflective sheen, gritty metallic dust on floor, heavy industrial smoke
Avoid: oversaturated colors, plastic-looking textures, cartoonish proportions, 8K stuffer words, oversharpening, watermark
